channel.title: [Guest post] How to use Frontity with SpinupWP
channel.description:
In this post, Gilbert (from the SpinupWP team) teaches us how to set up and host a Frontity site using [SpinupWP](https://spinupwp.com/), the cloud-based server control panel built by Delicious Brains.
Thanks for putting this together! 🙌
https://frontity.org/blog/how-to-use-frontity-with-spinupwp/

item.title: [Guest post] How to use Frontity with SpinupWP
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
In this post, Gilbert (from the SpinupWP team) teaches us how to set up and host a Frontity site using SpinupWP, the cloud-based server control panel built by Delicious Brains.

Thanks for putting this together!

Frontity – 17 Nov 20

How to use Frontity with SpinupWP

In this article, we’re going to look at how to set up and host a Frontity site using SpinupWP.

Read full topic
item.source: [Guest post] How to use Frontity with SpinupWP
